texto: ..I don't count Jennifer among my mistakes. She had a severe infection and precious little reserve. Nevertheless, I think of her often. Those minutes of terror and confusion I felt standing powerless in her room served as a visceral reminder throughout my training... that the big picture isn't enough in medicine...
explicacao: Citação de Lisa Sanders sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “..I don't count Jennifer among my mistakes. She had a severe infection and precious little reserv…” articula reflexao, doctoring, medicine em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e medicine.
